title: Bernstein Multi-Tenant Audit Export (v2)
description: Versioned wire format for tenant-scoped HMAC-chained audit-log slices. v2 layers two opt-in cryptographic features on top of v1: (a) a verifiable RFC 3161 TimeStampToken — bernstein.core.security.rfc3161_verifier walks the TSA cert chain end-to-end, no longer deferred to operator toolchain — and (b) an Ed25519 signature over the bundle's head_sha256 ('head_signature' block) so a key-less auditor can authenticate the bundle's origin without sharing the operator's HMAC key. v1 readers tolerate v2 bundles by ignoring the additional 'head_signature' field — additionalProperties=true at the top level is intentional.

schema_version.description: Pinned schema version. v2 readers accept v1 bundles transparently; v1 readers ignore unknown top-level fields gracefully.

tenant_id.description: Normalized tenant identifier (matches src/bernstein/core/security/tenanting.normalize_tenant_id). Empty/null inputs collapse to 'default'.

genesis_prev_hmac.description: Sentinel prev_hmac of the first event in the slice. The slice is locally re-chained so this is always 0*64.

head_hmac.description: HMAC of the final event in the slice (or 0*64 when the window is empty). Verifiable with the operator's HMAC key.

head_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the canonical JSONL serialization of the slice. Tamper-evident even without the HMAC key — flipping any byte of any event changes this anchor.

event_count.description: Number of events included in the slice after tenant + window filtering.

events.description: Tenant-scoped events in chronological order. Each event was re-chained for the slice, so its prev_hmac links to the previous event's hmac, not the original orchestrator-wide chain. Original orchestrator HMAC is preserved in details._original_hmac for cross-reference.

tenant_id.description: Normalized tenant id; the filter key.

_original_hmac.description: Witness of the event's HMAC in the original orchestrator-wide chain. Lets an auditor cross-reference back to the source log.

prev_hmac.description: HMAC of the prior event in this slice (genesis = 0*64 for the first event).

hmac.description: HMAC of this event in the slice-local chain.

signature.description: Detached signature/anchor block. The 'signature_kind' selects which verifier path applies.

signature_kind.description: Verifier identifier. v1 kinds: 'hmac-chain-only', 'hmac-chain+rfc3161', 'hmac-chain+offline-anchor'. v2 adds: 'hmac-chain+pubkey' (HMAC + Ed25519 signature over head_sha256) and 'hmac-chain+rfc3161+pubkey' (both layers).

alg.description: Algorithm used for the chain HMAC.

rfc3161_token_b64.description: Base64-encoded DER RFC 3161 TimeStampToken. Present iff signature_kind contains 'rfc3161'.

rfc3161_tsa_url.description: URL of the TSA that issued the token (operator-supplied).

offline_anchor.description: Air-gap anchor block. Present iff signature_kind == 'hmac-chain+offline-anchor'.

anchor_sha256.description: sha256(head_sha256 || anchored_at_iso) — deterministic and auditable but does not certify wall-clock truth.

head_signature.description: Optional Ed25519 signature over chain_anchor.head_sha256 (raw 32-byte digest). Present iff signature_kind contains 'pubkey'. v1 readers ignore this block.

alg.description: Signature algorithm. Pinned to EdDSA (Ed25519) per RFC 8032.

public_key_jwk.description: RFC 7517 JWK for the verifying key (RFC 8037 OKP/Ed25519 form). Auditors can pin this externally for additional trust.
